about.title_zh: 全球工业品供应链专家
about.content_zh:
WaterbearIntl成立于2008年，总部位于中国制造业核心区域，是一家专业的工业产品出口贸易公司。我们致力于为全球客户提供高质量的中国制造工业产品。

公司拥有超过5000平方米的仓储设施，与国内外200多家优质供应商建立了长期战略合作关系，年出口额突破2亿美元。我们的团队由经验丰富的国际贸易专家、技术工程师和多语种客服人员组成。
about.content_en:
Founded in 2008 and headquartered in China's manufacturing heartland, WaterbearIntl is a professional industrial products export company. We are dedicated to providing high-quality Chinese-manufactured industrial products to global clients.

With over 5,000 sqm of warehouse facilities and 200+ premium suppliers, annual exports exceed $200M. Our team consists of experienced international trade specialists, technical engineers, and multilingual customer service professionals.

services.content_zh: 从产品采购到最终交付，我们提供全链路服务，覆盖采购代理、质量控制、物流清关、OEM定制、售后支持和市场咨询六大核心领域。
services.content_en: From product sourcing to final delivery, we offer end-to-end services covering sourcing agency, quality control, logistics, OEM customization, after-sales support, and market consulting.
